body: [{"ac":1,"text":"`.ddx/executions/\u003crun-id\u003e/production-reachability-final.json` exists and contains the current-tree production reachability/deadcode result used for closure evaluation.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":2,"text":"`.ddx/executions/\u003crun-id\u003e/reach-backfill-summary.md` exists and lists total violations found, wired count, deleted count, pending count, and every follow-up bead ID filed for residual work.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":3,"text":"Any remaining `// wiring:pending` annotation cites an open follow-up bead; `rg -n -P '//\\s*wiring:pending(?!\\s+ddx-)' cli` returns no hits.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":4,"text":"If the final artifact reports residual live violations, focused child beads are filed under `ddx-83440482` before this bead is closed; if it reports none, the summary explicitly says `ddx-83440482` is close-ready.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":5,"text":"`cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/bead -run TestReadyExecutionBreakdown_ClassifiesEpicClosureCandidates -count=1` passes.","kind":"test-name","verifiable":true},{"ac":6,"text":"`cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./...` passes, or any unrelated pre-existing failure is captured in the summary and filed as a separate bead with the exact failing `Test*` name.","kind":"build-gate","verifiable":true},{"ac":7,"text":"`lefthook run pre-commit` passes.","kind":"build-gate","verifiable":true}]

{"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"readiness check timed out after 1s (ddx-d2acaf21)","fingerprint":"3de07a18c763b3c48ab0477e8e46aa75d36519a2ac4f977ef55c0e706e89d78e","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"timeout","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.timeout","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment"}
